instruction: Using Terminal, write the string value {VALUE} for key {KEY} in the preference domain com.guibench.demo.
source: cove-original (design 047 §7 cfprefsd flush); Tier-A defaults getter reads the live value after a cfprefsd flush

args: defaults write com.guibench.demo {KEY} -string {BASELINE}; killall cfprefsd 2>/dev/null || true
defaults write com.guibench.demo {KEY} -string {VALUE}; killall cfprefsd 2>/dev/null || true
